subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-11-28
subcodes.first_line: In this Cause I had many wishes, none of which are realized. My first and greatest wish was that I may become confirmed in the service of the Holy Threshold.
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Ascension of Baha'u'llah, @Shrines and Holy places, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @service to others; to the Cause of God
